/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -std=c++11 -g -O2 -fstack-protector-strong -Wformat -Werror=format-security -D_FORTIFY_SOURCE=2  -frounding-math -fPIC -std=c++11 -g  -shared -Wl,-soname,libbvpvalidator.so -o devel/lib/libbvpvalidator.so CMakeFiles/bvpvalidator.dir/src/BVPMotionValidator.cpp.o -lmpfr -lgmp /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libCGAL_Core.so.11.0.1 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libCGAL.so.11.0.1 -lboost_thread -lboost_system -lpthread
